result.status_detail: PII warning rendered with 차단 — W1+W2 struct-collapse regression did NOT regress M365 Copilot warning

notes: check-warning, m365.cloud.microsoft/chat/?auth=2. Dedicated --new-window + hard reload (ctrl+shift+r); confirmed logged-in (user 최장희 + 상업용 데이터 보호 배지, no sign-in prompt). Clipboard verified = prompt; composer value verified pre-submit = '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567'. Submitted via 보내기 button, waited 120s, re-foregrounded M365 window by title. DOM block warning rendered: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)' contains expected '차단'. Composer cleared post-submit. Baseline PASS preserved (#1177/#1188/#1205 iter5 3-frame).
